name: Identifying barriers and facilitators to successful
snippet: This review identified a need for CDSS to be designed to fit the workflows and contexts of clinical practice for effective implementation outcomes. No determinants mapped to the “embedding over time” domain of NASSS, underscoring the need to examine how implementation factors change over time.
